data.title: The probability of the Federal Reserve keeping interest rates unchanged in January is 95%.
data.description: According to CME's "FedWatch": the probability of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates by 25 basis points in January is 5%, and the probability of keeping rates unchanged is 95%. By March, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut is 26%, the probability of keeping rates unchanged is 72.8%, and the probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut is 1.2%.

data.title: White House: Trump may impose broader tariffs on semiconductor imports soon.
data.description: The White House: Trump may soon impose broader tariffs on imports of semiconductors and their derivatives.

data.title: The Trump administration plans to appoint the FTC chairman to head a new anti-fraud division within the Justice Department.
data.description: According to sources familiar with the matter, Trump administration officials are considering appointing Federal Trade Commission (FTC) Chairman Andrew Ferguson to head the Justice Department's newly created division tasked with combating nationwide fraud. Ferguson would remain as FTC chairman. Vice President Vance stated last week that the division would be overseen by the White House and would have "nationwide jurisdiction over fraud issues." Vance also indicated that the Justice Department would create a new Assistant Attorney General position to lead related fraud investigations. This structure would blur the traditional lines between the president and the Justice Department, which already has several divisions dedicated to criminal and civil fraud investigations. The law also explicitly prohibits commissioners from "engaging in any other business, profession, or employment relationship." It remains unclear whether this provision will affect Ferguson's appointment to the new role.

data.title: Trump says Iran's "killing" has stopped, potentially hinting at a pause in military action against Iran.
data.description: According to foreign media reports, US President Trump stated that he had been assured that Iran would stop "killing" protesters, a statement suggesting he might postpone a military response to the Iranian protests. As a result, international oil prices fell by as much as 4% in the short term. Trump told reporters in the Oval Office on Wednesday, "We've been told that the killings by Iran are stopping—they've stopped. And there are no plans for executions, and no executions have been carried out." He said he would be "very disappointed" if this information proved untrue. These remarks came after Trump called on the Iranian people to continue opposing the Khamenei government and stated that he would "take appropriate action" after learning the number of protester deaths.

data.title: Coinbase Breaks Ranks on Senate Crypto Bill Ahead of Vote — Here Is Why It Matters
data.description:
Coinbase, one of the leading cryptocurrency exchanges in the United States, has decided to diverge from the consensus among its industry peers regarding a significant Senate bill that pertains to cryptocurrency regulation, just days before the crucial vote is scheduled to take place. This development is noteworthy for several reasons, including the potential implications for the future of crypto legislation, the influence it may have on other companies within the sector, and the broader context of regulatory challenges faced by the cryptocurrency industry as it continues to evolve. Here, we delve into the reasons why this decision is particularly consequential and what it could mean for both Coinbase and the wider cryptocurrency landscape.
source: https://blocknews.com/coinbase-breaks-ranks-on-senate-crypto-bill-ahead-of-vote-here-is-why-it-matters/

data.title: SEC Ends Zcash Foundation Probe With No Enforcement Action
data.description:
The Zcash Foundation said the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission has closed a multi-year investigation into the organization without recommending any enforcement action. The decision ends a period of regulatory uncertainty that began quietly more than two years ago and only became public after the foundation received a subpoena in late 2023
source: https://www.ethnews.com/sec-ends-zcash-foundation-probe-with-no-enforcement-action/
